sending.canonicalEvidence: The target recognizes you as the sender if it knows you. You know if the delivery fails. If you try another message while blocked, you learn that you are blocked.
sending.structuredState: No sender recognition, delivery failure knowledge, or blocked knowledge fields.
sending.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
sending.issue: Sending creates knowledge states for sender recognition, delivery failure, and blocked status.
sending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgePayload for sender recognition if known, deliveryFailureKnown, and blockedKnown.

sending.canonicalEvidence: If the target is on a different plane than you, there is a 5 percent chance that the message does not arrive. Upon receiving your message, a creature can block your ability to reach it again with this spell for 8 hours. If you try to send another message during that time, you learn that you are blocked, and the spell fails.
sending.structuredState: No delivery failure or recipient block fields.
sending.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no failure/block state.
sending.issue: Sending has delivery failure and recipient-created block conditions that can cause later casts to fail.
sending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery failure and recipient block/cooldown fields.
sending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deliveryFailure and recipientBlock duration 8 hours with failure result on blocked recast.

sending.canonicalEvidence: A creature you have met or a creature described to you by someone who has met it.
sending.structuredState: Valid Targets: creature; no known/described target qualification fields.
sending.jsonState: Runtime targeting allows creatures without met/described qualification.
sending.issue: Sending target eligibility depends on having met the target or receiving a description from someone who has met it.
sending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetQualification metByCaster or describedBySomeoneWhoMetTarget.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: A 40-foot-tall, 20-foot-radius Cylinder centered on a point you choose within range.
sleet-storm.structuredState: Area Size and Area Height now preserve radius 20 and height 40.
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime areaOfEffect now has Cylinder size 20 and height 40 feet.
sleet-storm.issue: The chosen point and cylinder geometry are represented.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: No geometry change required for this row.
sleet-storm.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by correcting the cylinder radius/height in structured markdown and runtime JSON.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: When a creature enters the Cylinder for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition and lose Concentration.
sleet-storm.structuredState: Save Stat: Dexterity; Conditions Applied: Prone; no entry/start timing or concentration-loss fields.
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime has Dexterity save to Prone but trigger is immediate and concentration loss is not typed.
sleet-storm.issue: The save/Prone part is partially represented, but trigger timing and Concentration loss are not.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area entry/start-turn trigger and concentration-loss fields.
sleet-storm.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger for enters first time on turn or starts turn there, plus concentrationLoss on failed save.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: Ground in the Cylinder is Difficult Terrain.
sleet-storm.structuredState: No TERRAIN effect field beyond prose.
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no TERRAIN effect.
sleet-storm.issue: Sleet Storm creates Difficult Terrain on the ground in the cylinder, but runtime has no terrain effect.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain effect fields for ground in area.
sleet-storm.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime TERRAIN difficult effect for cylinder ground.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: When a creature enters the Cylinder for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there...
sleet-storm.issue: The recurring area entry/start trigger is not represented.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring area trigger fields with once-per-turn entry handling.
sleet-storm.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaTrigger enters_first_time_on_turn or turn_start.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: Exposed flames in the area are doused.
sleet-storm.structuredState: No flame dousing or extinguish fields.
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no extinguish effect.
sleet-storm.issue: This detector row is not healing; it is an environmental extinguish effect.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: Add exposed flame extinguish fields under environmental effects.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: On a failed Dexterity save the creature has the Prone condition and loses Concentration.
sleet-storm.structuredState: Conditions Applied: Prone; no Concentration loss field.
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime Prone effect exists without fake escape/repeat defaults, but no Concentration loss.
sleet-storm.issue: Prone is represented; Concentration loss on failed save is not.

sleet-storm.canonicalEvidence: The area is Heavily Obscured, and exposed flames in the area are doused.
sleet-storm.structuredState: No heavily obscured or flame dousing fields.
sleet-storm.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no environmental visibility/extinguish effects.
sleet-storm.issue: Sleet Storm creates heavily obscured weather and douses exposed flames, but both are prose-only.
sleet-storm.recommendedTemplateChange: Add heavilyObscured and extinguishFlames environmental fields.
sleet-storm.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange for heavily obscured area and exposed flame dousing.
